caption: Standalone stance-order player gesture (#593), completing the STANCE order plumbing from PR #592. Previously the stance hotkeys (H/F/R/K/G/J) only ARMED a mode for the NEXT move/attack order -- there was no way to change a unit's stance in place. Now Ctrl+<stance key> writes the stance directly onto the selected units with no move/attack needed (the clip presses Ctrl+H to set Hold), and the new I key toggles each unit's intra-unit rank-relief (discipline) mode -- the training-driven rank-cycle/morale-recovery knob from #529. Both route through Battle.enqueue_stance, so they're recorded and replay exactly like every other order. A flash toast confirms each write ("Hold", then "Rank relief: Off").
